actions.description: Generate one email turn packet and persist packet + summary artifacts.
actions.notes: turn must be a positive integer; target should be a non-empty recipient string.

actions.description: Load a library or custom gauntlet preset into cockpit session state.
actions.notes: source must be one of library/custom; selection may be preset name or 1-based index for library.

actions.description: Build and persist preview summary for currently loaded gauntlet without launching a run.
actions.notes: requires a previously loaded gauntlet in session state.

actions.description: Return structured recent artifact rows from cockpit-managed artifact surfaces.
actions.notes: returns path fallback rows when no summary files are available.
